channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Stop guessing with your money. While the world panics, the top 1% are positioning themselves for the biggest wealth transfer in history.
channel.description: Stop guessing with your money. The global economy is changing faster than ever.

item.title: France offers some hope for defeating populists
item.description: "Can France's approach be a blueprint for defeating populism? In a recent article by The Economist, experts weigh in on the country's strategy and what it might mean for the future of European politics. Read more here: https://www.economist.com/europe/2026/03/26/france-offers-some-hope-for-defeating-populists"
